title: Better Farm Animals
description: Updates farm animals to look more realistic
body:
![Banner that says Better Farm Animals](https://i.imgur.com/4iraxqS.png)

READ BEFORE USING

This resource pack works for minecraft versions 1.20.4 and below down to version 1.8.9.
This resource pack requires Optifine OR the EMF + ETF mods to work. 

**WHAT THIS RESOURCE PACK DOES**
This resource pack updates farm animals to look more realistic.  Each animal has a custom model with at least 2 different texture varieties.  The following animals are updated:  ![An image of the following updated models: cow, sheep, pig, rabbit, chicken, goose (a variation of the chicken) and duck (another variation of the chicken)](https://i.imgur.com/Dh8DyW3.png)   Geese and ducks are biome-dependent variations of the chicken
Updated entities (for when the images on this page don't load) Cows

Sheep

Pigs

Rabbits

Chickens

Geese - some chickens spawn as geese

Ducks - some chickens spawn as ducks
